label: generalist medical practitioner
definition: A medical doctor that diagnoses, treats and prevents illness, disease, injury and other physical and mental impairments and maintains general health in humans through application of modern medicine. They do not limit their practice to certain disease categories or methods of treatment, and may assume responsibility for the provision of continuing and comprehensive medical care to individuals, families and communities.

label: specialist medical practitioner
definition: A medical doctor that diagnoses, treats and prevents illness, disease, injury and other physical and mental impairments in humans, using specialized testing, diagnostic, medical, surgical, physical and psychiatric techniques through application of the principles and procedures of modern medicine. They specialize in certain disease categories, types of patient or methods of treatment and may conduct medical education and research in their chosen areas of specialization.

label: nursing and midwifery professional
definition: A health professional that provides treatment and care services for people who are physically or mentally ill, disabled or infirm, and those with potential risks to health including before, during and after childbirth. They assume responsibility for the planning, management and evaluation of the care of patients, including the supervision of other health care workers, working autonomously or in teams with medical doctors and others in the practical application of preventive and curative measures.

label: nursing professional
definition: A health professional that provides treatment, support and care services for people who are in need of nursing care due to the effects of ageing, injury, illness or other physical or mental impairment, or potential risks to health.

label: midwifery professional
definition: A health professional that plans, manages, provides and evaluates midwifery care services before, during and after pregnancy and childbirth. They provide delivery care for reducing health risks to women and newborn children, working autonomously or in teams with other health care providers.

label: traditional and complementary medicine professional
definition: A health professional that examines patients, prevents and treats illness, disease, injury and other physical and mental impairments and maintains general health in humans. They do this by applying knowledge, skills and practices acquired through extensive study of the theories, beliefs and experiences originating in specific cultures.

label: paramedical practitioner
definition: A health professional that provides advisory, diagnostic, curative and preventive medical services more limited in scope and complexity than those carried out by medical doctors. They work autonomously or with limited supervision of medical doctors, and apply advanced clinical procedures for treating and preventing diseases, injuries and other physical or mental impairments common to specific communities.

label: veterinarian
definition: A health professional that diagnoses, prevents and treats diseases, injuries and dysfunctions of animals.

label: dentist
definition: A health professional that diagnoses treats and prevents diseases, injuries and abnormalities of the teeth, mouth, jaws and associated tissues by applying the principles and procedures of modern dentistry.

label: pharmacist
definition: A health professional that stores, preserves, compounds and dispenses medicinal products and counsel on the proper use and adverse effects of drugs and medicines following prescriptions issued by medical doctors and other health professionals.

label: environmental and occupational health and hygiene professional
definition: A health professional that assesses, plans and implements programmes to recognize, monitor and control environmental factors that can potentially affect human health, to ensure safe and healthy working conditions and to prevent disease or injury caused by chemical, physical, radiological and biological agents or ergonomic factors.

label: physiotherapist
definition: A health professional  that assesses, plans and implements rehabilitative programmes that improve or restore human motor functions, maximize movement ability, relieve pain syndromes, and treat or prevent physical challenges associated with injuries, diseases and other impairments.

label: dietician and nutritionist
definition: A health professional  that assesses, plans and implements programmes to enhance the impact of food and nutrition on human health.

label: audiologist and speech therapist
definition: A health professional  that evaluates, manages and treats physical disorders affecting human hearing, speech, communication and swallowing.

label: optometrist and ophthalmic optician
definition: A health professional  that provides diagnosis, management and treatment services for disorders of the eyes and visual system.

label: teaching professional
definition: A professional that teaches the theory and practice of one or more disciplines at different educational levels.

label: university and higher education teacher
definition: A teaching professional that prepares and delivers lectures and conduct tutorials in one or more subjects within a prescribed course of study at a university or other higher educational institution. They conduct research, and prepare scholarly papers and books.

label: vocational education teacher
definition: A teaching professional that teaches or instructs vocational or occupational subjects in adult and further education institutions and to senior students in secondary schools and colleges.

label: secondary education teacher
definition: A teaching professional that teaches one or more subjects at secondary education level.

label: primary school teacher
definition: A teaching professional that teaches teach a range of subjects at the primary education level.

label: early childhood educator
definition: A teaching professional that promotes the social, physical, and intellectual development of children below primary school age through the provision of educational and play activities.

label: special needs teacher
definition: A teaching professional that teaches children, young persons or adults with physical or intellectual special needs.

label: music teacher
definition: A teaching professional that teaches students in the practice, theory and performance of music in private or small group tuition or within mainstream educational institutions.

label: arts teacher
definition: A teaching professional  that teaches students in the practice, theory and performance of dance, drama, visual and other arts (excluding music) in private or small group tuition or within mainstream educational institutions.

label: legal, social and cultural professional
definition: A professional that conducts research, improves or develops concepts, theories and operational methods, or applies knowledge relating to the law, social or cultural studies.

label: legal professional
definition: A legal, social and cultural professional that conducts research on legal problems, advises clients on legal aspects of problems, pleads cases or conducts prosecutions in courts of law, presides over judicial proceedings in courts of law and draft laws and regulations.

label: librarian, archivist and curator
definition: A legal, social and cultural professional that develops and maintains collections of archives, libraries, museums, art galleries and similar establishments.

label: social professional
definition: A legal, social and cultural professional that conducts research, improves or develops concepts, theories and operational methods or applies knowledge relating to psychology, sociology, philosophy, politics, economics, sociology, anthropology, history and other social sciences, or provides social services to meet the needs of individuals and families in a community.

label: psychologist
definition: A social professional that studies the mental processes and behaviour of human beings as individuals or in groups, and applies this knowledge to promote personal, social, educational or occupational adjustment and development.

label: social work and counselling professional
definition: A social professional that provides advice and guidance to individuals, families, groups, communities and organizations in response to social and personal difficulties. They assist clients to develop skills and access resources and support services needed to respond to issues arising from unemployment, poverty, disability, addiction, criminal and delinquent behaviour, marital and other problems.

label: religious professional
definition: A legal, social and cultural professional that functions  as a perpetuator of sacred traditions, practices and beliefs. They conduct religious services, celebrate or administer the rites of a religious faith or denomination, provide spiritual and moral guidance and perform other functions associated with the practice of a religion.

label: author and journalist
definition: A legal, social and cultural professional that conceives and creates literary works, and interprets and communicates news and public affairs through the media.

label: linguist
definition: A legal, social and cultural professional that translates or interprets from one language into another.

label: creative and performing artist
definition: A legal, social and cultural professional that communicates ideas, impressions and facts in a wide range of media to achieve particular effects, interprets a composition such as a musical score or a script to perform or direct the performance, and hosts the presentation of such performance and other media events.

label: technician and associate professional
definition: A professional that performs technical and related tasks connected with research and the application of scientific or artistic concepts and operational methods, and government or business regulations.

label: health associate professional
definition: A technician and associate professional that performs technical and practical tasks to support diagnosis and treatment of illness, disease, injuries and impairments in humans or animals, and supports the implementation of health care usually established by medical, veterinary, nursing and other health professionals.

label: medical and pharmaceutical technician
definition: A health associate professional that performs technical tasks to assist in diagnosis and treatment of illness, disease, injuries and impairments.

label: nursing and midwifery associate professional
definition: A health associate professional that provides basic nursing and personal care for people who are physically or mentally ill, disabled or infirm, and for others in need of care due to potential risks to health including before, during and after childbirth. They generally work under the supervision of, and in support of, implementation of health care, treatment and referrals plans established by medical, nursing, midwifery and other health professionals.

label: nursing associate professional
definition: A nursing and midwifery associate professional that provides basic nursing and personal care for people in need of such care due to effects of ageing, illness, injury, or other physical or mental impairment. They generally work under the supervision of, and in support of, implementation of health care, treatment and referrals plans established by medical, nursing and other health professionals.

label: midwifery associate professional
definition: A nursing and midwifery associate professional that provides basic health care and advice before, during and after pregnancy and childbirth. They implement care, treatment and referral plans usually established by medical, midwifery and other health professionals.

label: traditional and complementary medicine associate professional
definition: A health associate professional that prevents and treats human physical and mental illnesses, disorders and injuries using herbal and other therapies based on theories, beliefs and experiences originating in specific cultures. They administer treatments using traditional techniques and medicaments, either acting independently or according to therapeutic care plans established by a traditional medicine or other health professional.

label: dental assistant and therapist
definition: A health associate professional that provides basic dental care services for the prevention and treatment of diseases and disorders of the teeth and mouth, according to care plans and procedures established by a dentist or other oral health professional.

label: community health worker
definition: A health associate professional that provides health education, referral and follow-up, case management, basic preventive health care and home visiting services to specific communities. They provide support and assistance to individuals and families in navigating the health and social services system.

label: physiotherapy technician and assistant
definition: A health associate professional that provides physical therapeutic treatments to patients in circumstances where functional movement is threatened by injury, disease or impairment. Therapies are usually provided according to rehabilitative plans established by a physiotherapist or other health professional.

label: medical assistant
definition: A health associate professional that performs basic clinical and administrative tasks to support patient care under the direct supervision of a medical practitioner or other health professional.

label: environmental and occupational health inspector and associate
definition: A health associate professional that investigates the implementation of rules and regulations relating to environmental factors that may affect human health, safety in the  workplace, and safety of processes for the production of goods and services. They may implement and evaluate programmes to restore or improve safety and sanitary conditions under the supervision of a health professional.

label: ambulance worker
definition: A health associate professional that provides emergency health care to patients who are injured, sick, infirm or otherwise physically or mentally impaired prior to and during transport to medical facilities.

label: business and administration associate professional
definition: A technician and associate professional that performs mostly technical tasks connected with the practical application of knowledge relating to financial accounting and transaction matters, mathematical calculations, human resource development, selling and buying financial instruments, specialized secretarial tasks and enforcing or applying government rules.

label: legal and related associate professional
definition: A technician and associate professional that performs support functions in courts of law or in law offices, provide services related to such legal matters as insurance contracts, the transferring of property and the granting of loans and other financial transactions, or conduct investigations for clients.

label: social work associate professional
definition: A technician and associate professional that implements social assistance programmes and community services and assist clients to deal with personal and social problems.

label: religious associate professional
definition: A technician and associate professional that provides support to ministers of religion or to a religious community, undertake religious works, preach and propagate the teachings of a particular religion and endeavour to improve well-being through the power of faith and spiritual advice.

label: sport and fitness worker
definition: A technician and associate professional that prepares for and competes in sporting events for financial gain, trains amateur and professional sportsmen and women to enhance performance, promotes participation and standards in sport, organises and officiates sporting events, or provides instruction, training and supervision for various forms of exercise and other recreational activities.

label: athlete and sports player
definition: A sport and fitness worker that participates in competitive sporting events. They train and compete, either individually or as part of a team, in their chosen sport.

label: sports coach, instructor and official
definition: A sport and fitness worker that works with amateur and professional sportspersons to enhance performance and encourage greater participation in sport, and organizes and officiates in sporting events according to established rules.

label: fitness and recreation instructor and programme leader
definition: A sport and fitness worker that leads, guides and instructs groups and individuals in recreational, fitness or outdoor adventure activities.

label: artistic, cultural and culinary associate professional
definition: A technician and associate professional that combines creative skills and technical and cultural knowledge in creative media or food.

label: information and communications technician
definition: A technician and associate professional that provides support for the day to day running of computer systems, communication systems and networks, broadcast images and sound, telecommunication signals on land, sea or in aircraft.

label: clerical support worker
definition: An occupational role that records, organizes, stores, computes and retrieves information, and performs a number of clerical duties in connection with money-handling operations, travel arrangements, requests for information, and appointments.

label: services and sales worker
definition: An occupational role that provides personal or protective services related to travel, house-keeping, catering, personal care, protection against fire and unlawful acts, or sells goods in retail or markets.

label: personal services worker
definition: A services and sales worker that provides personal services related to travel, housekeeping, catering and hospitality, hairdressing and beauty treatment, animal care grooming and training, companionship and other services of a personal nature.

label: sales worker
definition: A services and sales worker that demonstrates goods in wholesale or retail shops, at stalls and markets, door to door, via telephone or customer contact centres. They may record and accept payment for goods and services purchased, and may operate small retail outlets.

label: personal care worker
definition: A services and sales worker that provides care, supervision and assistance for children, patients and elderly, convalescent or disabled persons in institutional and residential settings.

label: child care worker
definition: A personal care worker that provides care and supervision for children in non-domestic settings.

label: teachers? aide
definition: A personal care worker that performs non-teaching duties to assist teaching staff, and provides care and supervision for children in schools and pre-schools.

label: health care assistant
definition: A personal care worker that provides direct personal care and assistance with activities of daily living to patients and residents in a variety of health care settings, working  in implementation of established care plans and practices, and under the direct supervision of medical, nursing or other health professionals or associate professionals.

label: home-based personal care worker
definition: A personal care worker that provide routine personal care and assistance with activities of daily living to persons who are in need of such care due to effects of ageing, illness, injury, or other physical or mental conditions, in private homes and other independent residential settings.

label: protective services worker
definition: A services and sales worker that protects individuals and property against fire and other hazards, maintain law and order and enforce laws and regulations.

label: skilled agricultural, forestry and fishery worker
definition: An occupational role that grows and harvests plants or animals to provide food, shelter and income for themselves and their households.

label: craft and related trades worker
definition: An occupational role that applies specific technical and practical knowledge and skills to construct and maintain buildings, machinery, equipment or tools, carries out printing work, and produces or processes foodstuffs, textiles and wooden, metal and other articles, including handicraft goods.

label: plant and machine operator
definition: An occupational role that operates and monitors industrial and agricultural machinery and equipment on the spot or by remote control, or drives and operates trains, motor vehicles and mobile machinery and equipment.

label: assembler
definition: An occupational role that assembles products from component parts according to strict specifications and procedures.

label: elementary occupation
definition: An occupational role that involves the performance of simple and routine tasks which may require the use of hand-held tools and considerable physical effort.

label: armed forces occupation
definition: An occupational role that includes all jobs held by members of the armed forces.

label: researcher
definition: An occupational role that is a researcher but unclear what discipline.

label: student or trainee role
definition: A role which inheres in a person and is realised by being enrolled in an educational institution or a formal programme of professional training.

label: informal education student or trainee
definition: A student or trainee that is currently learning in a non-institutional setting.

label: school student or trainee
definition: A student or trainee that is currently learning at a primary or secondary education level in an institutional, organised setting.

label: vocational training student or trainee
definition: A student or trainee that is currently learning the curriculum material of vocational programme, normally in preparation for employment in a trade, job or profession.

label: higher education student or trainee
definition: A student or trainee that is currently learning on an advanced educational programme in a university, college or professional school.

label: undergraduate student or trainee
definition: A higher education student or trainee that is currently studying for an undergraduate degree.

label: graduate student or trainee
definition: A higher education student or trainee that has completed an undergraduate degree.

label: masters student or trainee
definition: A higher education student or trainee that is currently studying for a Masters degree.

label: doctoral student or trainee
definition: A higher education student or trainee that is currently studying for a doctoral degree.

label: discipline of current programme of study or training
definition: An expertise discipline of the programme of study currently undertaken by the bearer of a student or trainee role.

label: relatedness between person source and the target population
definition: A personal role of source that is realised in some relationship to the characteristics of the intervention participants.

label: family member
definition: A person who is a member of a group of persons united by blood, or by marriage or other legal arrangement, or by self-identity as belonging to the same family.

label: parent or guardian
definition: A family member that is a mother, father or legal carer of a child.

label: spouse or partner
definition: A family member that is an individual who is married or in a committed relationship with another individual.

label: sibling relationship
definition: A family member that is a family relationship between two persons with at least one shared parent.

label: child relationship
definition: A family member that is an offspring relationship from a person to their parent.

label: carer
definition: A relatedness between person source and the target population that is an individual who cares, unpaid, for a friend or family member who, due to illness or disability, requires support in their daily life activities.

label: friend
definition: A relatedness between person source and the target population that is a person whom the participant knows, likes and trusts, typically exclusive of sexual or family relations.

label: colleague
definition: A relatedness between person source and the target population that is a person with whom the participant works in a profession or business.

label: employer
definition: A relatedness between person source and the target population that is a person which hires the services of the participant.

label: peer
definition: A relatedness between person source and the target population that is descried as matched to intervention recipients on the basis of ‘peerness’ – age, social status, gender, shared experience, shared health status etc.

label: embedded in participants? community
definition: A relatedness between person source and the target population that is a source who is known and working to deliver intervention in own community.

label: number of people delivering intervention to each participant
definition: A count data item that is the number of providers that an individual participant in the intervention encounters.

label: total number of people able to deliver intervention
definition: A count data item that is the total number of providers that are available and able to deliver the intervention.

label: socio demographic attribute of person source
definition: A social or demographic characteristic of a human being who is the bearer of a person source role.

label: age of person source
definition: A socio-demographic attribute of person source that is a time quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of how long the bearer has existed.

label: gender of person source
definition: A socio-demographic attribute of person source that is an individual's perception of having a particular gender, which may or may not correspond with their birth sex.

label: female gender
definition: A gender identity as being female.

label: male gender
definition: A gender identity as being male.

label: other gender
definition: A gender of person source that reports not belonging to the cultural gender role distinctions of either male or female.

label: ethnic group membership of person source
definition: A socio-demographic attribute of person source that is the ethnic group to which an individual identifies as belonging, where an ethic group is a population whose members have a common heritage that is real or presumed such as common culture, language, religion, behaviour or biological trait.

label: religious group membership of person source
definition: A socio-demographic attribute of person source that is a religious group to which an individual identifies as belonging, where a religious group is a group of people characterised by the practice of a common religion.

label: language proficiency of person source
definition: A socio-demographic attribute of person source that is an individual’s ability to speak or perform in the intervention language.

label: health status of person source
definition: A socio-demographic attribute of person source that represents their mental or physical condition.

label: target behaviour of person source
definition: A socio-demographic attribute of person source that is their amount or experience of the intervention’s target behaviour.

label: psychological influence on intervention delivery of person source
definition: A socio-demographic attribute of person source that is their existing psychological attributes related to or potentially affecting the target behaviour.

label: expertise of person source
definition: A disposition that is an expert skill or knowledge held by the source delivering the behaviour change intervention.

label: knowledge or skill
definition: An expertise of person source that is knowledge or skills held in order to deliver the behaviour change intervention.

label: pre-existing knowledge or skill
definition: A knowledge or skill that is already possessed by the source which allows them to deliver the behaviour change intervention, including educational level and qualifications.

label: expertise discipline
definition: An attribute that is a field of knowledge or practice.

label: discipline of pre-existing knowledge or skill
definition: The expertise discipline in which the person source has acquired their pre-existing knowledge and skills.

label: acquired knowledge or skill
definition: A knowledge or skill that is additional knowledge or skills supplied to the source to allow them to deliver the behaviour change intervention, including educational level and qualifications.

label: amount of experience
definition: A knowledge or skill that is the duration of experience in related domain held by person source.

label: affiliation to a formal group or organisation
definition: A pre-existing knowledge or skill that is recognised through affiliation to a formal group or organisation.

label: supervision of person source
definition: A process in which a person source is formally provided, by an individual with appropriate expertise, with corrective and skill-enhancing feedback, regarding the person source’s performance in delivering the intervention.

label: volunteering of person source
definition: A process in which a person source delivers the intervention on a voluntary basis without formal compensation.

label: payment of person source
definition: A process in which a person source is paid or compensated for delivering the intervention.

label: monetary payment
definition: A payment of person source that is money, vouchers or valued objects given to the source for delivering the intervention.

label: non-monetary payment
definition: A payment of person source that is non-monetary compensation given to the source for delivering the intervention.

label: source role related to intervention
definition: A BCI source whose occupational or voluntary role is focused on delivery of the behaviour change intervention.

label: source involved in development of intervention
definition: A BCI source that is involved in the development of intervention content.

label: source involved in co-production of intervention
definition: A source involved in development of intervention that has developed the intervention content in collaboration with key stakeholders such as patients or community members.

label: organisational source role
definition: A BCI source role that is borne by an organisation.

label: organisation source
definition: An organisation that is the bearer of a behaviour change intervention source role, such as voluntary, public or commercial organisations delivering a behaviour change intervention.

label: behaviour change intervention mode of delivery
definition: An attribute of a BCI delivery that is the physical or informational medium through which a BCI is provided.

label: informational mode of delivery
definition: Mode of delivery that involves intentional transmission of a representation of the world to an intervention recipient with the aim of changing that person's representation of the world.

label: human interactional mode of delivery
definition: Informational mode of delivery that involves a person as intervention source who interacts with an intervention recipient in real time.

label: face to face mode of delivery
definition: Human interactional mode of delivery that involves an intervention source and recipient being together in the same location and communicating directly.

label: at-a-distance mode of delivery
definition: Human interactional mode of delivery that involves an intervention source and recipient being in different locations and communicating through a communication channel.

label: printed material mode of delivery
definition: Informational mode of delivery that involves use of printed material.

label: letter mode of delivery
definition: Printed material mode of delivery that involves a letter or postcard that can be sent through the post or handed directly to the recipient

label: public notice mode of delivery
definition: Printed material mode of delivery that involves display of a poster, sign or notice in a public location.

label: printed publication mode of delivery
definition: Printed material mode of delivery that involves use of of a printed publication.

label: labelling mode of delivery
definition: Printed material mode of delivery that involves information printed on a product or its packaging, or a label attached to or included with, a product or its packaging, and aims to convey information about that product.

label: electronic mode of delivery
definition: Informational mode of delivery that involves electronic technology in the presentation of information to an intervention recipient.

label: television mode of delivery
definition: Electronic mode of delivery that involves presentation of information that is broadcast and displayed by television.

label: mobile digital device mode of delivery
definition: Electronic mode of delivery that involves presentation of information by a handheld mobile digital device that can store, retrieve and process data.

label: computer mode of delivery
definition: Electronic mode of delivery that involves presentation of information by a desktop or laptop computer.

label: electronic billboard mode of delivery
definition: Electronic mode of delivery that involves presentation of information by an electronic screen positioned in a public location.

label: wearable electronic device mode of delivery
definition: Electronic mode of delivery that involves presentation of information by an electronic device that is worn or carried on the body.

label: electronic environmental object mode of delivery
definition: Electronic mode of delivery that involves an electronic device positioned in the environment of the intervention recipient that can gather information and respond to commands.

label: 3-D projection mode of delivery
definition: Electronic mode of delivery that involves presentation of a 3-D image.

label: virtual reality mode of delivery
definition: Electronic mode of delivery that involves use of virtual reality through a virtual reality headset and optionally body movement sensors.

label: playable electronic storage mode of delivery
definition: Electronic mode of delivery that involves presentation of information stored on an object that is inserted into a playing device.

label: radio broadcast mode of delivery
definition: Electronic mode of delivery that involves presentation of audio information that is broadcast and received by a radio receiver.

label: call mode of delivery
definition: Electronic mode of delivery that involves a communication process in which a signal is sent by a caller to a recipient to alert them of the communication intent, giving the recipient the opportunity to enage with the communication.

label: audio call mode of delivery
definition: Call mode of delivery that involves only audio information in the communication.

label: video call mode of delivery
definition: Call mode of delivery that involves video and audio information in the communication.

label: messaging mode of delivery
definition: Call mode of delivery that involves textual information in the communication.

label: email mode of delivery
definition: Electronic mode of delivery that involves communication by email.

label: video game mode of delivery
definition: Electronic mode of delivery that involves the intervention recipient playing a computer game.

label: website mode of delivery
definition: Electronic mode of delivery that involves the intervention recipient interacting with a website.

label: mobile application mode of delivery
definition: Electronic mode of delivery that involves the intervention recipient interacting with a mobile application.

label: e-book mode of delivery
definition: Electronic mode of delivery that involves the intervention recipient being given access to an e-book.

label: audio informational mode of delivery
definition: Informational mode of delivery that involves sound.

label: visual informational mode of delivery
definition: Informational mode of delivery that involves visual images.

label: textual mode of delivery
definition: Informational mode of delivery that involves written text.

label: environmental change mode of delivery
definition: Mode of delivery that involves changing the physical shape, size, structure or appearance of objects in the environment of the intervention recipient.

label: somatic mode of delivery
definition: Mode of delivery that involves devices or substances that alter bodily processes or structure.

label: ingestion mode of delivery
definition: Somatic mode of delivery that involves ingestion of a chemical into the body.

label: transdermal mode of delivery
definition: Ingestion mode of delivery that involves ingestion of a chemical through the skin.

label: alimentary mode of delivery
definition: Somatic mode of delivery that involves ingestion of a chemical through the stomach or intestine.

label: pill mode of delivery
definition: Alimentary mode of delivery that involves swallowing of a pill or oral capsule.

label: ingestable liquid mode of delivery
definition: Alimentary mode of delivery that involves swallowing of a liquid.

label: buccal mode of delivery
definition: Ingestion mode of delivery that involves absorption of a chemical through the lining of the buccal cavity.

label: inhalation mode of delivery
definition: Ingestion mode of delivery that involves absorption of a chemical through  the upper airways or lungs by inspiration.

label: injection mode of delivery
definition: Ingestion mode of delivery that involves a chemical being introduced into body tissue through a hollow needle that punctures the skin.

label: subcutaneous injection mode of delivery
definition: Injection mode of delivery in which the tissue receiving the chemical is subcutaneous tissue.

label: intravenous injection mode of delivery
definition: Injection mode of delivery in which the tissue receiving the chemical is venous blood.

label: intramuscular injection mode of delivery
definition: Injection mode of delivery in which the tissue receiving the chemical is muscle.

label: wearable ingestion mode of delivery
definition: Ingestion mode of delivery that involves a device that is worn on the body.

label: chewable substance mode of delivery
definition: Ingestion mode of delivery that involves chewing of a soft material.

label: physical stimulus mode of delivery
definition: A mode of delivery that involves application of a physical stimulus to the body.

label: light exposure mode of delivery
definition: Physical stimulus mode of delivery that involves exposure of light to the body

label: temperature mode of delivery
definition: Physical stimulius mode of delivery that involves application of heat or cold to the body.

label: electrical stimulation mode of delivery
definition: Physical stimulus mode of delivery that involves application of electrical stimulation to the body.

label: physical pressure mode of delivery
definition: Physical stimulus mode of delivery that involves application of physical pressure to the outside of the body.

label: wearable stimulus mode of delivery
definition: Physical stimulus mode of delivery that involves a device that is worn on the body.

label: somatic alteration mode of delivery
definition: Mode of of delivery that involves modifying the structure of the body of the recipient of the intervention.

label: individual-based mode of delivery
definition: Mode of delivery that involves one recipient in the location where the intervention is delivered.

label: pair-based mode of delivery
definition: Mode of delivery that involves two recipients in the location where the intervention is delivered who have an interpersonal relationship.

label: group-based mode of delivery
definition: Mode of delivery that involves three or more people in the location where the intervention is delivered.

label: uni-directional mode of delivery
definition: Mode of delivery in which the only causal influence is from the intervention source to the recipient.

label: interactional mode of delivery
definition: Mode of delivery in which there is causal influence from the intervention source to the recipient and from the recipient to the source.

label: synchronous mode of delivery
definition: Mode of delivery that involves delivery and receipt of the intervention or its components occurring at the same time or very close in time.

label: asynchronous mode of delivery
definition: Mode of delivery that involves receipt of the intervention or its components taking place a significant period of time after delivery.

label: push mode of delivery
definition: Mode of delivery that is not dependent on actions on the part of the intervention recipient.

label: pull mode of delivery
definition: Mode of delivery that requires some action on the part of the recipient.

label: gamification mode of delivery
definition: Mode of delivery that involves application of typical elements of game playing  to other areas of activity, typically as an online marketing technique to encourage engagement with a product or service.

label: arts feature mode of delivery
definition: Mode of delivery that involves application of creativity on the part of the intervention recipient.

label: participant engagement with behaviour change intervention
definition: Participant engagement with intervention, where the intervention focuses on changing behaviour.

label: behaviour change intervention setting
definition: An aggregate of entities that form the environment in which a BCI is provided.

label: behaviour change intervention population
definition: An intervention population who are exposed to a behaviour change intervention.

label: behaviour change intervention participant
definition: An intervention participant who is exposed to a behaviour change intervention.

label: human age
definition: A personal attribute that is a time quality inhering in a person by virtue of how long since the person was born.

label: sexual orientation
definition: A personal attribute that is the pattern of a person's emotional, romantic and/or sexual attractions.

label: asexual
definition: A sexual orientation of an individual who does not experience sexual attraction.

label: bisexual
definition: A sexual orientation of an individual who experiences sexual attraction to members of more than one sex.

label: heterosexual
definition: A sexual orientation of an individual who experiences sexual attraction exclusively or primarily to members of a different sex.

label: homosexual
definition: A sexual orientation of an individual who experiences sexual attraction exclusively or primarily to members of the same sex.

label: questioning sexual orientation
definition: A self-identity as being in the process of exploring one's sexual orientation.

label: queer
definition: A sexual orientation that is not exclusively homosexual or heterosexual, or of a person who does not identify with heterosexual, homosexual or bisexual labels.

label: other sexual orientation
definition: A sexual orientation of an individual who is sure of their sexual orientation and reports it as other than asexual, bisexual, heterosexual, homosexual, queer or questioning.

label: country of birth
definition: A geographic location that is the country in which a person was born.

label: immigrant
definition: A person who has previously been a resident of a country and is now resident in another country.

label: second generation immigrant
definition: A person who has at least one parent who is an immigrant.

label: religious group membership
definition: A personal attribute that is belonging to a group that is characterised by the practice of a common religion by the group members.

label: language proficiency
definition: A linguistic capability that is realised by using a language accurately and appropriately in more than one setting.

label: ability to read in intervention language
definition: A linguistic capability that is realised by reading and understanding text in the intervention language.

label: ability to write in intervention language
definition: A linguistic capability that is realised by generating written text in the intervention language.

label: ability to speak in intervention language
definition: A linguistic capability that is realised by producing speech  in the intervention language.

label: ability to comprehend spoken intervention language
definition: A linguistic capability that is realised by following and understanding speech in the intervention language.

label: member of a one person household
definition: A person living alone in a household.

label: member of a multi-person household
definition: A person living in  a household with at least one other person.

label: member of a multi-person multi-generational household
definition: A member of a multi-person household where some household members belong to different generations.

label: member of a multi-person household all related
definition: A member of a multi-person household where all of the household members are related.

label: member of a multi-person household some related
definition: A member of a multi-person household where some household members are related.

label: member of a multi-person household not related
definition: A member of a multi-person household where none of the household members are related.

label: individual income
definition: A personal attribute reflecting a benefit the person receives  derived from their capital or labour, usually measured in money.

label: household income
definition: An aggregate of the individual incomes received by all the members of a household.

label: residential facility owner
definition: An owner of a residential facility.

label: owner-occupier
definition: A person who lives in a residential facility of which they are the residential facility owner

label: renter
definition: A person who lives in a residential facility they do not own in return for paying an agreed sum of money to the residential facility owner

label: renter of housing from a social provider
definition: A renter who lives in a residential facility where the residential facility owner decides who can live in the residential facility based on their perceived social or economic needs.

label: rent-free occupier
definition: A person who lives in a residential facility they do not own without paying an agreed sum of money to the residential facility owner.

label: agreed rent-free occupier
definition: A rent-free occupier who lives in the residential facility with the agreement of the residential facility owner.

label: rent-free occupier without owner's permission
definition: A rent-free occupier who lives in the residential facility without the agreement of the residential facility owner.

label: occupier of employer-provided housing
definition: A person who lives in a residential facility they do not own  with the agreement of the residential facility owner, by virtue of the occupier bearing a role realised in an employment process.

label: homeless person
definition: A person who does not own a residential facility and does not have an agreement with a residential facility owner that would enable them to live in a residential facility.

label: income-related welfare benefit
definition: Individual income that an individual otherwise of low-income receives as a payment made by the state or an insurance scheme in the form of housing vouchers,  credit or benefits.

label: health insurance policy holder role
definition: A policy holder role that inheres in a person who participates in the creation of an insurance contract designed to cover some or all of the cost of treating the insured person's illnesses or injuries as well as possibly providing preventive health care.

label: valuable material resource owned
definition: An object aggregate under the control of some person or organisation which confers an economic benefit to that person or organisation in an economic system.

label: quantity of valuable material resource owned
definition: A data item about the number of units of a valuable material resource possessed by a person.

label: value of valuable material resource owned
definition: A data item about the monetary value of a valuable material resource possessed by a person.

label: number of years in education completed
definition: The number of years a person spent engaged in an education process.

label: highest level of formal educational qualification achieved
definition: A personal attribute related to the highest level of education achieved.

label: discipline of highest level of formal educational qualification achieved
definition: An expertise discipline of the highest level of formal educational qualification a person has achieved.

label: achieved early childhood education
definition: A highest level of formal educational qualification achieved after participating in an education process intended to introduce very young children to a school-type environment.

label: achieved primary education
definition: A highest level of formal educational qualification achieved after participating in an education process intended to result in the acquisition of fundamental skills in reading, writing and mathematics.

label: achieved lower secondary education
definition: A highest level of formal educational qualification achieved after participating in an education process intended to result in the acquisition and development of skills and knowledge in subject areas more specialised than basic reading, writing and mathematics, with the overall goal of laying the foundation for lifelong learning and human development on which education systems may systematically expand further educational opportunities.

label: achieved upper secondary education
definition: A highest level of formal educational qualification achieved after participating in an education process intended to result in the acquisition and development of skills and knowledge that prepare participants for tertiary education or employment.

label: achieved bachelor's degree or equivalent level
definition: A highest level of formal education qualification achieved after participating in an education process intended to result in the acquisition and development of skills and knowledge in a specialised discipline that culminated in the award of an undergraduate degree.

label: achieved master's or equivalent level
definition: A highest level of formal educational qualification achieved after participating in an education process which has as a prerequisite an undergraduate degree and which is intended to result in the acquisition and development of advanced academic or professional skills and knowledge in a specialised discipline, that culminated in the award of a Master's or equivalent degree.

label: achieved doctoral or equivalent level education
definition: A highest level of formal educational qualification achieved after participating in an education process devoted to advanced study and original research that led to the award of a PhD or equivalent level qualification.

label: employed
definition: An employment status realised by an individual being engaged in an activity or service for wages or salary.

label: employed full time
definition: An employment status realised by an individual working a standard number of hours defined as full-time by their employer.

label: employed part time
definition: An employment status realised by an individual whose working hours involving less than the standard or customary working time.

label: in permanent employment
definition: An employment status realised by an individual working for a company or other organisation without a pre-determined end date, with security of employment and known working conditions.

label: in short term or temporary employment with known conditions
definition: An employment status realised by an individual working for a company or other organisation in a position that is of a known, fixed duration with security of employment for that duration and certain working conditions.

label: in uncertain employment
definition: An employment status realised by an individual working for a company or other organisation in a position with uncertain duration or hours with unknown or low security of working conditions or pay.

label: self employed status
definition: An employment status realised by a person earning income directly from customers, clients, or other organisations rather than as a specified salary or wages from an employer.

label: employed in shift work
definition: An employment status realised by an individual working for recurring periods in which different groups of workers do the same jobs in relay.

label: voluntary worker status
definition: A personal attribute inhering in a person by virtue of that person working or assisting at a workplace without receiving remuneration.

label: not seeking employment
definition: A personal attribute inhering in a person by virtue of that person not having a paid job and not currently seeking to begin participating in an employment process.

label: not working for health reasons
definition: A personal attribute inhering in a person by virtue of that person not bearing a role realised in an employment process, due to being unable to work due to illness or disability.

label: stay at home parent or guardian status
definition: A personal attribute inhering in a person by virtue of that person not bearing a role realised in an employment process, due to being a homemaker whose work includes caring for children.

label: unpaid carer for an adult status
definition: A personal attribute inhering in a person by virtue of that person not bearing a role realised in an employment process, due to their primary occupation being caring, without receiving a wage for it, for an adult friend or family member who, due to illness or disability, requires support in their daily life activities.

label: homemaker status
definition: A personal attribute inhering in a person who does not bear a role realised in an employment process and who manages their home as their main daily activity.

label: independently wealthy status
definition: A personal attribute inhering in a person who does not bear a role realised in an employment process due to possessing enough wealth to not need financial support from another person or require income from employment.

label: retired status
definition: A personal attribute inhering in a person who previously bore a role realised in an employment process but has withdrawn from that employment process, having concluded their working or professional career.

label: socioeconomic status category
definition: A  data item about a category assigned to a person based on an assessment of a score calculated from various measures of their income, education, occupation, family size or household.

label: socioeconomic status score
definition: A data item about a score on a measure of a person's socioeconomic status, calculated by combining information about the number of years of education completed, their individual or household income, their current occupation or the industry in which they work or family size or household.

label: interpersonal role
definition: A role relating to personal relationships or association between an individual and other individuals, including kinship relations, romantic, business, and social interactions.

label: relationship status
definition: A personal attribute that is whether an individual is connected or associated with another through romantic attraction or marriage.

label: single
definition: A relationship status where the individual is not in a relationship with another person.

label: in a stable or common law relationship
definition: A relationship status where the individual has had the same partner for a significant length of time but is not in a legal union.

label: in a legal marriage or union
definition: A relationship status where the individual is in a legally formalised marriage or civil partnership.

label: divorced or separated
definition: A relationship status where the individual was previously in a legally formalised relationship and this relationship has now ended or dissolved.

label: widowed
definition: A relationship status where the individual is no longer in a legally formalised marriage or civil partnership due to the death of their spouse or partner.

label: caregiving role
definition: A role which inheres in a person and is realised by the person assuming responsibility for the physical and emotional needs of another who has difficulties with self care.

label: organisational role
definition: A role which inheres in a person and is realised by performing the activities deemed appropriate for that particular role as specified in the organisation rules.

label: inpatient role
definition: A patient role which inheres in a person and is realized by being under the care of a physician or health care provider and being admitted to a hospital or equivalent facility.

label: outpatient role
definition: A patient role which inheres in a person and is realized by coming to a healthcare facility for diagnosis or treatment but not being admitted for an overnight stay.

label: ability to comprehend spoken intervention language population statistic
definition: A population statistic about ability to comprehend spoken intervention language.

label: percentage ability to comprehend spoken intervention language population statistic
definition: A ability to comprehend spoken intervention language population statistic that is the percentage of people that have a ability to comprehend spoken intervention language in the population.

label: informal education student role
definition: A student or trainee role realised by  currently learning in a non-institutional setting.

label: preschool student role
definition: A student or trainee role realised by  currently learning at an initial level of organised instruction, primarily to familiarise the bearer to the school-type environment.

label: school student role
definition: A student or trainee role realised by currently learning at a primary or secondary education level in an institutional, organised setting.

label: vocational training student or trainee role
definition: A student or trainee role realised by currently learning the curriculum material of vocational programme, normally in preparation for employment in a trade, job or profession.

label: higher education student role
definition: A student or trainee role realised by currently learning on an advanced educational programme in a university, college or professional school. For example, completing a university bachelor's or master's course of study, medical school or other professional school.

label: undergraduate student role
definition: A higher education student role realised by currently studying for an undergraduate degree.

label: graduate student role
definition: A higher education student role realised by currently studying for a more advanced degree after completing an undergraduate degree.

label: masters student role
definition: A higher education student  role realised by currently studying for a masters degree.

label: caste membership
definition: A personal attribute as belonging to a group within a stratified system of categorisation based on a status conferred at birth based on descent, in which individuals have limited or no mobility due to custom or law.

label: health status attribute
definition: A personal attribute that is the state of an individual's mental or physical condition.

label: medication use status
definition: A health status attribute that is having been prescribed the use of one or more drugs to improve, maintain or protect one's health.

label: intervention participant
definition: A person who is exposed to an intervention.

label: intervention population
definition: A human population who are exposed to an intervention.

label: child
definition: A person who has not yet reached maturity.

label: ethnic group membership
definition: A self-identity as belonging to a social group or groups whose members have a common cultural or ancestral heritage.

label: gender identity
definition: A self-identity as having a particular gender, which may or may not correspond with sex assigned at birth.

label: proportion ability to comprehend spoken intervention language population statistic
definition: A ability to comprehend spoken intervention language population statistic that is the proportion of people that have a ability to comprehend spoken intervention language in the population.

label: ability to read in intervention language population statistic
definition: A population statistic about ability to read in intervention language.

label: nonbinary gender
definition: A gender identity as having a gender that is not well-described by the binary categories of male or female.

label: non-gendered identity
definition: A self-identity as not having a particular gender.

label: transgender
definition: A gender identity that differs from the person's assigned sex at birth.

label: cisgender
definition: A gender identity that matches the person's assigned sex at birth.

label: biological sex
definition: A bodily quality based on reproductive function or organs.

label: female biological sex
definition: A biological sex associated with the ability to produce female gametes.

label: male biological sex
definition: A biological sex associated with the ability to produce male gametes.

label: parental role
definition: An interpersonal role that is realised through a process of promoting and supporting the physical, emotional, social, and intellectual development of a child from infancy to adulthood.

label: percentage ability to read in intervention language population statistic
definition: A ability to read in intervention language population statistic that is the percentage of people that have a ability to read in intervention language in the population.

label: parent
definition: A family member who is a key caretaker or immediate progenitor of a child.

label: biological parent
definition: A parent who provided one of the gametes that resulted in one's conception.

label: biological mother
definition: A biological parent who provided an egg.

label: biological father

definition: An adoptive parent who is female gender.

label: stepfather

label: biological sister
definition: A biological sibling who is female gender.

label: biological brother

label: adoptive sibling

label: adoptive sister
definition: An adoptive sibling who is female gender.

label: adoptive brother
definition: An adoptive sibling who is male gender.

label: step-sibling

label: stepsister
definition: A step-sibling who is female gender.

label: stepbrother
definition: A step-sibling who is male gender.

label: foster sibling
definition: A sibling who shares a parent through a parent-child relationship created by a foster care agreement.

label: foster sister
definition: A foster sibling who is female gender.

label: foster brother
definition: A foster sibling who is male gender.

label: twin
